meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Debugging for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills setup to crush debugging bottlenecks. A high-impact guide for freelancers to ship faster using Antigravity and AI-driven workflows.
content.answer_block: To eliminate debugging bottlenecks, integrate Claude Code into your local environment to automate root-cause analysis. By mapping your codebase with Antigravity, you provide Claude with the structural context needed to pinpoint errors, suggest precise fixes, and verify patches instantly, turning hours of tedious troubleshooting into seconds of automated resolution.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, your client is waiting, and your terminal is bleeding red error logs. You’ve spent the last three hours chasing a ghost in the stack trace, and the frustration is mounting. Every line of code you rewrite feels like a gamble rather than a solution, eating into your profit margins and your sanity.

But what if you could outsource the grunt work of debugging to a senior-level AI partner? By mastering Claude Code skills, you transform your development environment from a lonely struggle into a collaborative engine. This guide is your blueprint for reclaiming your time and delivering bulletproof code consistently.

steps.title: Initialize Environment Context
steps.description: Establish a clear project baseline so Claude understands the architecture before you start debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and identify the primary entry points and core dependencies for this project.

steps.title: Automate Error Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed your error logs directly into Claude Code to get an immediate, high-level diagnostic report.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the latest error logs and correlate them with the function definitions in the module causing the crash.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "analyze error log: [paste log here]"

steps.title: Perform Surgical Code Refactoring
steps.description: Apply precision fixes rather than broad rewrites to maintain system stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a surgical fix for the identified bug that minimizes side effects in downstream modules.

steps.title: Execute Automated Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure your fix didn't break existing functionality by running targeted test suites.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test case that reproduces the bug and verifies the fix remains stable after refactoring.

steps.title: Document the Resolution
steps.description: Create a clean audit trail for your client, demonstrating the fix and the logic behind it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the debugging process, the root cause, and the applied fix for a professional client update.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate technical summary of changes for client"

pro_tips: Always use the '--read' flag in Claude Code to limit the agent's scope to specific modules, preventing 'hallucinated' architectural changes.
Pair your Antigravity context map with a 'rules.md' file in your root folder; Claude reads this as a system prompt to enforce your coding standards.
When debugging complex state issues, use Claude Code to dump the current variable state into a JSON object for easier comparison against expected values.
If a fix is too complex, ask Claude to 'decompose into three atomic commits' to keep your git history clean and reversible.
Use Antigravity's 'diff' mode to review AI-suggested changes side-by-side with your original code before committing.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module using this workflow, integrate these commands into a custom Makefile to automate your entire testing and patching lifecycle.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop fighting your code and start commanding it. Stop wasting billable hours on syntax errors and start delivering high-value, production-ready software. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
